title: More Armor
description:
More Armor for Minecraft Forge! 

Easy to obtain armor for all uses!  

+Custom Armor Attributes

+Custom Crafting Recipes
body:
This mod adds More Armor for Minecraft version 1.12.2 - 1.15.2 - 1.16.5 - 1.18.2 - 1.19.2 - 1.19.4 - 1.20.1


 

Check out all my mods: https://linktr.ee/chickenmods

 

Check out the Mod Wiki: [Click Me](https://gitlab.com/chicken647/more-armor/-/wikis/Home) 

 

Easy to obtain armor for all uses!  

 

+Custom Armor Attributes

+Custom Crafting Recipes


Armor Currently Added: 

- Emerald Armor

- Lapis Armor

- Redstone Armor

- Oak Armor

- Birch Armor

- Jungle Armor

- Acacia Armor

- Dark Oak Armor

- Leaves Armor

- Magma Armor

- Slime Armor

- Cobblestone Armor

- Ice Armor

- Golden Apple Armor

- Enchanted Golden Apple Armor

- Coal Armor

- Obsidian Armor

- Totem Armor

- Food Armor

- Glowing

- Water

- Sponge

- Tnt

- Shulker

- Enhanced Diamond

- Sugarcane

- Iron Bar

- Melon

- Dirt

- Sand

- Flint

- Sugar

- Stick

 

New: 

 - Enhanced Netherite

 

- Powered Stick (Resource)

 

- Powered Ore (Resource)

 

- Powered Staff (Tool)

 

- Block Of Power 

 

- Power Nugget

 

- Power Dust

 

 

Want me to add a type of armor that is not currently available? Post a comment letting me know and ill see what I can do!
